cost_name: Alkaline H₂ Compression — 1 bar Outlet → Industrial Offtake (30 bar) — 100 MW — Europe 2025

estimation.estimation_method: IRENA 2024 compression cost breakdown. Alkaline atmospheric output requires first-stage compression from 1→30 bar (multi-stage reciprocating) plus second stage to offtake pressure. PEM avoids the first stage entirely.

confidence.rationale: Based on IRENA 2024 and compressor OEM data (Burckhardt, Howden). Well-established compression cost for hydrogen service. The Alkaline compression penalty vs PEM is ~€70/kW for industrial offtake.

primary_drivers: Pressure ratio (1→30 bar = high ratio requiring 3-4 compression stages)
